testCases: TC1: input { param1: 25000, param2: 1, param3: "starter", param4: false } → output { total: 99, breakdown: { baseCost: 49, extraWordsCost: 50, extraUsersCost: 0, discount: 0 } }
TC2: input { param1: 20000, param2: 1, param3: "starter", param4: false } → output { total: 49, breakdown: { baseCost: 49, extraWordsCost: 0, extraUsersCost: 0, discount: 0 } }
TC3: input { param1: 30000, param2: 2, param3: "starter", param4: false } → output { total: 169, breakdown: { baseCost: 49, extraWordsCost: 100, extraUsersCost: 20, discount: 0 } }
TC4: input { param1: 150000, param2: 3, param3: "pro", param4: false } → output { total: 579, breakdown: { baseCost: 99, extraWordsCost: 400, extraUsersCost: 80, discount: 0 } }
TC5: input { param1: 600000, param2: 5, param3: "business", param4: false } → output { total: 1399, breakdown: { baseCost: 499, extraWordsCost: 500, extraUsersCost: 400, discount: 0 } }
TC6: input { param1: 25000, param2: 1, param3: "starter", param4: true } → output { total: 79.2, breakdown: { baseCost: 49, extraWordsCost: 50, extraUsersCost: 0, discount: 19.8 } }
TC7: input { param1: 0, param2: 1, param3: "starter", param4: false } → output { total: 49, breakdown: { baseCost: 49, extraWordsCost: 0, extraUsersCost: 0, discount: 0 } }
TC8: input { param1: -100, param2: 1, param3: "starter", param4: false } → output { error: "Word count cannot be negative" }
TC9: input { param1: 1000, param2: 0, param3: "starter", param4: false } → output { error: "Number of users must be at least 1" }
TC10: input { param1: 1000, param2: 1, param3: "advanced", param4: false } → output { error: "Invalid plan type" }
TC11: input { param1: "abc", param2: 1, param3: "starter", param4: false } → output { error: "Word count must be a number" }
TC12: input { param1: 1000, param2: "2", param3: "starter", param4: false } → output { error: "Number of users must be a number" }
TC13: input { param1: 1000000, param2: 100, param3: "business", param4: false } → output { total: 12899, breakdown: { baseCost: 499, extraWordsCost: 2500, extraUsersCost: 9900, discount: 0 } }
TC14: input { param1: 1000, param2: 1, param4: false } (missing param3) → output { error: "Plan type is required" }
TC15: input { param1: 90000, param2: 1, param3: "pro", param4: false } → output { total: 99, breakdown: { baseCost: 99, extraWordsCost: 0, extraUsersCost: 0, discount: 0 } }
TC16: input { param1: 500000, param2: 1, param3: "business", param4: false } → output { total: 499, breakdown: { baseCost: 499, extraWordsCost: 0, extraUsersCost: 0, discount: 0 } }
TC17: input { param1: 600000, param2: 5, param3: "business", param4: true } → output { total: 1119.2, breakdown: { baseCost: 499, extraWordsCost: 500, extraUsersCost: 400, discount: 279.8 } }
TC18: input { param1: NaN, param2: 1, param3: "starter", param4: false } → output { error: "Word count must be a valid number" }
TC19: input { param1: Infinity, param2: 1, param3: "starter", param4: false } → output { error: "Word count must be a finite number" }
TC20: input { param1: 1000, param2: true, param3: "starter", param4: false } → output { error: "Number of users must be a number" }
TC21: input { param1: 1000, param2: 1, param3: "starter", param4: null } → output { error: "Annual billing must be a boolean" }
TC22: input { param1: 1000, param2: 1.5, param3: "starter", param4: false } → output { error: "Number of users must be a whole number" }
